system.description: A force staff houses its core psi-lattice inside a sturdy casing made from polished metal, bone, exotic wood, or any number of other materials. Usually topping a force staff is an elaborate, circuitry-laced concentration icon whose imagery coincides with the weapon’s origin. A force staff acts as an exceptional Psy-Focus, granting +15 to Invocation Tests. This bonus applies as long as the staff is held in at least one hand. However, striking with the weapon requires both hands.
